master_row.title: Recon Hamiltonian
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Adjoint Functor Reconstruction] Given observed gravitational field spectrum $S_{\text{obs}}(\omega)$, the optimal quantum state reconstruction is: \begin{equation} |\Psi_{\text{recon}}\rangle = \mathcal{R}[S_{\text{obs}}] = \arg\min_{|\Psi\rangle} \|S[\mathcal{F}(|\Psi\rangle)] - S_{\text{obs}}\|_2^2 \end{equation} subject to helicity conservation: \begin{equation} \mathcal{H}[\Psi_{\text{recon}}] = \mathcal{H}_{\text{obs}} \end{equation} \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Spectral Inversion Theory’: quantum and geometric domains: subject to helicity conservation
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\emergent_curvature_theory.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
